Resume.title: Resume
Resume.description: Represents a candidate's resume, including raw content, parsed information, and links to extracted details such as skills, education, and experience.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Resume entity.

originalFileName.description: The original file name of the uploaded resume.

originalFileContent.description: The raw text content extracted directly from the uploaded resume file (e.g., PDF, DOCX).

parsedRawText.description: The cleaned and preprocessed raw text content of the resume, used for detailed analysis and embedding generation.

uploadDateTime.description: The date and time when the resume was uploaded to the system.

parsedName.description: The name of the candidate as extracted from the resume.

parsedEmail.description: The email address of the candidate as extracted from the resume.

parsedPhone.description: The phone number of the candidate as extracted from the resume.

parsedLocation.description: The geographical location or address of the candidate as extracted from the resume.

parsedSummary.description: A summary or objective statement extracted from the resume.

skillIds.description: References to Skill entities extracted from this resume. (Relationship: Resume N:N Skill)

educationIds.description: References to Education entities associated with this resume. (Relationship: Resume 1:N Education)

experienceIds.description: References to Experience entities associated with this resume. (Relationship: Resume 1:N Experience)

certificationIds.description: References to Certification entities associated with this resume. (Relationship: Resume 1:N Certification)

tfidfEmbeddingStorageReference.description: Reference or identifier to the externally stored TF-IDF vector embedding for this resume, used for similarity calculations.

bertEmbeddingStorageReference.description: Reference or identifier to the externally stored BERT embedding for this resume, used for advanced semantic similarity calculations.

JobDescription.title: JobDescription
JobDescription.description: Represents a job opening, including its raw content, parsed information, and links to required skills, education, and experience.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JobDescription entity.

title.description: The title of the job opening (e.g., 'Software Engineer', 'Data Scientist').

location.description: The geographical location of the job.

description.description: The raw, original text content of the job description as provided or scraped.

parsedRawText.description: The cleaned and preprocessed raw text content of the job description, used for analysis and embedding generation.

uploadDateTime.description: The date and time when the job description was added to the system.

externalId.description: An identifier from an external Applicant Tracking System (ATS) if integrated, allowing for seamless data transfer.

skillIds.description: References to Skill entities identified as key requirements for this job. (Relationship: JobDescription N:N Skill)

jobEducationRequirementIds.description: References to JobEducationRequirement entities detailing educational qualifications required for this job. (Relationship: JobDescription 1:N JobEducationRequirement)

jobExperienceRequirementIds.description: References to JobExperienceRequirement entities detailing work experience required for this job. (Relationship: JobDescription 1:N JobExperienceRequirement)

jobCertificationRequirementIds.description: References to JobCertificationRequirement entities detailing professional certifications required for this job. (Relationship: JobDescription 1:N JobCertificationRequirement)

tfidfEmbeddingStorageReference.description: Reference or identifier to the externally stored TF-IDF vector embedding for this job description, used for similarity calculations.

bertEmbeddingStorageReference.description: Reference or identifier to the externally stored BERT embedding for this job description, used for advanced semantic similarity calculations.

Skill.title: Skill
Skill.description: Represents an individual skill identified in resumes or job descriptions, serving as a common vocabulary.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Skill entity.

name.description: The name of the skill (e.g., 'Python', 'Machine Learning', 'Project Management').

category.description: An optional category for the skill (e.g., 'Programming Language', 'Soft Skill', 'Database').

Education.title: Education
Education.description: Represents an educational qualification achieved by a candidate, extracted from a resume.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Education entity.

fieldOfStudy.description: The major or field of study (e.g., 'Computer Science', 'Business Administration', 'Electrical Engineering').

institution.description: The name of the educational institution (e.g., 'MIT', 'Stanford University', 'University of London').

startDate.description: The start date of the education period.

endDate.description: The end date of the education period. Can be null if the education is ongoing.

grade.description: The GPA, grade, or relevant academic achievement (e.g., '3.8/4.0', 'First Class Honours').

resumeId.description: Reference to the Resume this education entry belongs to. (Relationship: Education N:1 Resume)

Experience.title: Experience
Experience.description: Represents a work experience entry for a candidate, extracted from a resume.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Experience entity.

title.description: The job title held (e.g., 'Software Engineer', 'Senior Project Manager', 'Data Analyst').

company.description: The name of the company or organization where the experience was gained.

startDate.description: The start date of the employment period.

endDate.description: The end date of the employment period. Can be null if currently employed.

description.description: A detailed description of responsibilities, achievements, and projects during this experience.

resumeId.description: Reference to the Resume this experience entry belongs to. (Relationship: Experience N:1 Resume)

Certification.title: Certification
Certification.description: Represents a professional certification obtained by a candidate, extracted from a resume.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Certification entity.

name.description: The name of the certification (e.g., 'AWS Certified Solutions Architect', 'Project Management Professional').

issuingAuthority.description: The organization or body that issued the certification.

issueDate.description: The date when the certification was issued.

expirationDate.description: The date when the certification expires. Can be null if it does not expire.

resumeId.description: Reference to the Resume this certification belongs to. (Relationship: Certification N:1 Resume)

JobEducationRequirement.title: JobEducationRequirement
JobEducationRequirement.description: Represents a specific educational requirement for a job description.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JobEducationRequirement entity.

jobDescriptionId.description: Reference to the JobDescription this requirement is associated with. (Relationship: JobEducationRequirement N:1 JobDescription)

degreeKeywords.description: Keywords or phrases describing the required degree (e.g., ['bachelor', 'master', 'phd']).

fieldOfStudyKeywords.description: Keywords or phrases describing the required field of study (e.g., ['computer science', 'engineering', 'business']).

isPreferred.description: Indicates if this education requirement is preferred rather than strictly mandatory.

description.description: The original or parsed textual description of the education requirement from the job description (e.g., 'Bachelor's degree in CS or related field required').

JobExperienceRequirement.title: JobExperienceRequirement
JobExperienceRequirement.description: Represents a specific work experience requirement for a job description.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JobExperienceRequirement entity.

jobDescriptionId.description: Reference to the JobDescription this requirement is associated with. (Relationship: JobExperienceRequirement N:1 JobDescription)

minimumYears.description: The minimum number of years of experience required (e.g., 3 for '3+ years experience').

relevantKeywords.description: Keywords or phrases describing the type of relevant experience required (e.g., ['software development', 'cloud computing', 'project management']).

isPreferred.description: Indicates if this experience requirement is preferred rather than strictly mandatory.

description.description: The original or parsed textual description of the experience requirement from the job description (e.g., '5+ years of experience with enterprise software development').

JobCertificationRequirement.title: JobCertificationRequirement
JobCertificationRequirement.description: Represents a specific professional certification requirement for a job description.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JobCertificationRequirement entity.

jobDescriptionId.description: Reference to the JobDescription this requirement is associated with. (Relationship: JobCertificationRequirement N:1 JobDescription)

nameKeywords.description: Keywords or phrases describing the required certification (e.g., ['AWS Certified', 'PMP', 'CSM']).

isPreferred.description: Indicates if this certification requirement is preferred rather than strictly mandatory.

description.description: The original or parsed textual description of the certification requirement from the job description (e.g., 'PMP certification required').

MatchResult.title: MatchResult
MatchResult.description: Stores the matching score and individual score components between a specific resume and a specific job description.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MatchResult entity.

resumeId.description: Reference to the Resume involved in this match. (Relationship: MatchResult N:1 Resume)

jobDescriptionId.description: Reference to the JobDescription involved in this match. (Relationship: MatchResult N:1 JobDescription)

tfidfScore.description: The similarity score calculated using the TF-IDF matching model.

bertScore.description: The similarity score calculated using the BERT embeddings matching model.

skillMatchWeight.description: The additional weight or score component derived from direct skill matching between resume and job description.

finalScore.description: The final combined matching score between the resume and job description, potentially incorporating availability or other LLM inputs.

matchDateTime.description: The date and time when this match result was calculated.

definition.description: Stores individual candidate resumes, including original content, parsed data, and a reference to the uploader. Includes denormalized 'uploaderId' for attribution and potential future access control.

params.name: resumeId
params.description: Unique identifier for a Resume document.

definition.description: Represents an educational qualification extracted from a specific resume. Includes 'resumeId' for data integrity and efficient querying.

params.name: resumeId
params.description: Unique identifier of the parent Resume document.

params.name: educationId
params.description: Unique identifier for an Education entry.

definition.description: Represents a work experience entry extracted from a specific resume. Includes 'resumeId' for data integrity and efficient querying.

params.name: resumeId

params.name: experienceId
params.description: Unique identifier for an Experience entry.

definition.description: Represents a professional certification extracted from a specific resume. Includes 'resumeId' for data integrity and efficient querying.

params.name: resumeId
params.description: Unique identifier of the parent Resume document.

params.name: certificationId
params.description: Unique identifier for a Certification entry.

definition.description: Stores individual job descriptions, including raw content, parsed data, and a reference to the uploader. Includes denormalized 'uploaderId' for attribution and potential future access control.

params.name: jobEducationRequirementId
params.description: Unique identifier for a JobEducationRequirement entry.

definition.description: Represents a work experience requirement for a specific job description. Includes 'jobDescriptionId' for data integrity and efficient querying.

params.name: jobDescriptionId
params.description: Unique identifier of the parent JobDescription document.

params.name: jobExperienceRequirementId
params.description: Unique identifier for a JobExperienceRequirement entry.

definition.description: Represents a professional certification requirement for a specific job description. Includes 'jobDescriptionId' for data integrity and efficient querying.

params.name: jobDescriptionId
params.description: Unique identifier of the parent JobDescription document.

params.name: jobCertificationRequirementId
params.description: Unique identifier for a JobCertificationRequirement entry.

definition.description: A master list of individual skills identified across resumes and job descriptions, serving as a common vocabulary.

params.name: skillId
params.description: Unique identifier for a Skill document.

definition.description: Stores the matching scores between a specific resume and a specific job description.

params.name: matchResultId
params.description: Unique identifier for a MatchResult document.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to be secure, scalable, and debuggable, adhering to the core design principles and strategy mandates. We have modeled top-level collections for core entities like `Resume`, `JobDescription`, `Skill`, and `MatchResult`. Sub-entities related to a resume (e.g., Education, Experience, Certifications) or a job description (e.g., JobEducationRequirements) are implemented as subcollections to maintain hierarchical data organization and simplify rules for nested data.

**Authorization Independence via Denormalization:** While the current access model assumes all uploaded data is accessible to all authenticated users of the system (e.g., a team of recruiters), `uploaderId` is included in `Resume` and `JobDescription` documents for attribution. For subcollections, `resumeId` and `jobDescriptionId` are explicitly included within their respective documents (e.g., `Education` documents have a `resumeId` field). This ensures that each document is self-contained with its direct parent identifier, which is crucial for data integrity and efficient querying. If future requirements introduce fine-grained, user-specific ownership where a subcollection's access depends on its parent's owner, the `uploaderId` (or a specific `ownerId`) would be denormalized into each subcollection document to eliminate the need for `get()` operations in security rules, thereby maintaining authorization independence. For instance, an `Education` document would then also include the `Resume`'s `uploaderId`.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):** The structure facilitates secure `list` operations by making collections homogeneous in their security posture. For example, all `Resume` documents are in the `/resumes` collection, allowing an authorized user to fetch all resumes without filtering in security rules. Similarly, all `JobDescription` documents are in `/jobDescriptions`. Subcollections like `/resumes/{resumeId}/education` allow listing all education entries for a specific resume. Since the primary access model is system-wide for authorized users, `list` queries on root collections can return all relevant documents, supporting the 'Ranking and Filtering' feature. If user-specific access were enforced for the parent documents, then `list` operations on subcollections would be inherently secure by being nested under an already authorized parent, or by querying the denormalized `uploaderId` field in the subcollection documents.
